title: Interpretability Tradeoff Evaluation: Arity Reduction, Accuracy Equivalence, and Pareto Analysis for 5 FIGS Variants
summary: Demo notebook evaluating interpretability tradeoffs across 5 FIGS split strategies (axis_aligned, random_oblique, unsigned_spectral, signed_spectral, hard_threshold). Uses 90 per-fold cross-validation results (2 datasets x 5 methods x 3 max_splits x 3 folds) to run 6 analyses: arity comparison table, arity reduction significance (Wilcoxon, bootstrap CI, Cohen's d), accuracy equivalence (Bayesian ROPE), Pareto frontier counting, path length analysis, and cognitive complexity metric. Full N_BOOTSTRAP=10,000 runs within timeout. Visualization includes arity bar chart, Pareto frontier percentages, and arity-vs-accuracy scatterplot.
